# Eden Communications
> Strategic PR & Communications for Crypto, Fintech & Frontier Tech

Eden Communications is a strategic public relations firm specializing in
cryptocurrency, fintech, and frontier technology companies. Founded by
Ebony Lewkovitz, former Washington correspondent for the New York Post.

## Services
- Strategic Counsel & Narrative Development
- Earned Media Relations
- Executive Visibility & Stakeholder Engagement
- AI-Powered Media & Market Intelligence

## Team
- Ebony Lewkovitz, Founder
- Larissa Bundziak, Director
- Gabrielle Gomez, Managing Account Supervisor
- Ryan Brack, SVP

- Email: hello@edencommunications.com
